URI.DisableResources TYPE: bool VERSION: 4.2.0 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Disables embedding resources, essentially meaning no pictures. You can still link to them though. See %URI.DisableExternalResources for why this might be a good idea. </p> <p> <em>Note:</em> While this directive has been available since 1.3.0, it didn't actually start doing anything until 4.2.0. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
